objective: Optimize and validate all systems worked on 2026-01-21: chain detection, pain-point templates, X Premium campaign, and outreach automation

userStories.title: Validate chain detection across all existing leads
userStories.description: Run chain detector on all leads in output/ and ensure franchises are properly flagged. Generate comprehensive report.
acceptanceCriteria: Run chain_detector.py on leads.json (569 leads)
Run chain_detector.py on follow_up_sequences.json (120 leads)
Generate report showing: total leads, independents, franchises
Verify no leads with 'national_chain' pain point have incorrect templates assigned
Save report to output/chain-detection-audit-20260121.md
userStories.notes: Validation of new chain detection system

userStories.title: Test all new SMS templates for character limits and variables
userStories.description: Verify all 8 new templates (franchise_*, few_reviews_*, low_rating_*, aggregator_*) are under 160 chars when variables are substituted with realistic values
acceptanceCriteria: Test each new template with sample data (business_name='Naples Family Fitness')
Verify all are under 160 chars after substitution (or document if intentionally over)
Verify all contain 'Reply STOP to opt out' for compliance
Verify personalization variables ($business_name, $first_name) work correctly
Create template-validation-report.md in output/

userStories.title: Optimize template selection logic flow
userStories.description: Review select_template_for_lead() in sms_outreach.py and ensure the priority order is optimal for avoiding false claims
acceptanceCriteria: Review template selection priority order
Verify franchises are ALWAYS caught before no_website check
Add unit tests for edge cases (e.g., 'Planet Fitness' should never get no_website template)
Test with sample leads from each pain point category
Document the selection flow in workflows/template-selection-logic.md
userStories.notes: CHECKPOINT: Critical to prevent Jan 2026 disaster repeat

userStories.title: Update outreach optimizer for new template categories
userStories.description: Ensure outreach_optimizer.py properly rotates templates within each pain point category for A/B testing
acceptanceCriteria: Update calculate_allocation() to handle new template categories
Add FRANCHISE_TEMPLATES, LOW_RATING_TEMPLATES, etc. to allocation logic
Verify exploration/exploitation phases work for each category
Test with dry-run to ensure correct template distribution
Update status report to show performance by category
userStories.notes: Enable A/B testing for new template types

userStories.title: Create X Premium content calendar
userStories.description: Based on updated x-campaign-sop.md, create a 7-day content calendar with API posts (280 char) and Premium posts (long-form)
acceptanceCriteria: Create content-calendar-template.json in social-media-automation/
Include 3-5 API posts per day (automated)
Include 1 Premium long-form post per day (manual)
Include 2 video content slots per week
Follow optimal posting times from SOP
Use templates from x-campaign-sop.md

userStories.title: Audit and optimize daily_followup_cron.sh
userStories.description: Review cron script for efficiency, error handling, and logging. Ensure all steps run correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test each step of the cron script independently
Verify Apollo lead enrollment works with new templates
Verify follow-up processing respects template selection logic
Verify response tracking syncs correctly
Add better error logging and notifications
Create cron-optimization-report.md

userStories.title: Create automated lead quality scoring
userStories.description: Implement a scoring system that prioritizes leads based on: pain points, business type (franchise vs independent), rating, review count
acceptanceCriteria: Create lead_scorer.py in src/
Score factors: is_franchise (-5 if false claims possible), low_rating (+3), few_reviews (+2), no_website (+3 if verified)
Higher score = higher priority for outreach
Integrate with outreach queue sorting
Generate scored lead list for next batch
userStories.notes: CHECKPOINT: Lead prioritization to maximize response rates

userStories.title: Generate comprehensive system documentation
userStories.description: Create a single-page reference guide covering all outreach components worked on today
acceptanceCriteria: Create OUTREACH-SYSTEM-GUIDE.md in lead-scraper/
Document: chain detection, website validation, template selection, pain points
Include command reference for all tools
Include troubleshooting section
Include monitoring/metrics section
Cross-reference all related SOPs and workflows

metadata.context: Optimization session following major fixes to chain detection and template system
